detail.description: Rob Refsnyder singles on a ground ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela, deflected by shortstop Marcelo Mayer. Julio Rodríguez to 3rd.
Rob Refsnyder singles on a ground ball to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Josh Naylor to 3rd.
Rob Refsnyder singles on a line drive to center fielder Zack Gelof.
Rob Refsnyder homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Rob Refsnyder homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field.
Rob Refsnyder singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Victor Scott II.
Rob Refsnyder singles on a ground ball to shortstop Zack Short. Josh Naylor to 2nd.
Rob Refsnyder singles on a line drive to right fielder Kerry Carpenter. J.P. Crawford scores. Julio Rodríguez to 2nd.
Rob Refsnyder homers (3) on a line drive to left field. J.P. Crawford scores. Josh Naylor scores.
Rob Refsnyder singles on a ground ball to right fielder Carlos Cortes. Josh Naylor to 2nd.
Rob Refsnyder singles on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith.
Rob Refsnyder singles on a line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile.
Rob Refsnyder singles on a line drive to left fielder Colton Cowser. Randy Arozarena to 2nd.
Rob Refsnyder singles on a line drive to right fielder Matt Wallner.
